Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type

Class FlixelColorTween

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.FlixelTween
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type.FlixelColorTween
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
public class FlixelColorTween extends FlixelTween
Interpolates between two colors and optionally applies tint to a FlixelSprite.

  • Method Details

    • setColorEndpoints

      public FlixelColorTween setColorEndpoints(@Nullable @Nullable FlixelSprite sprite, @Nullable @Nullable FlixelColor from, @Nullable @Nullable FlixelColor to, @Nullable @Nullable Runnable onColor)
      Tween between two FlixelColor endpoints.
      Parameters:
      sprite - The sprite to tween.
      from - The starting color.
      to - The ending color.
      onColor - The callback to run when the tween is complete.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • setColorEndpointsRaw

      public FlixelColorTween setColorEndpointsRaw(@Nullable @Nullable FlixelSprite sprite, @Nullable @Nullable com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color from, @Nullable @Nullable com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Color to, @Nullable @Nullable Runnable onColor)
      Tween between two libGDX Color values (copied into internal buffers).
      Parameters:
      sprite - The sprite to tween.
      from - The starting color.
      to - The ending color.
      onColor - The callback to run when the tween is complete.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • isTweenOf

      public boolean isTweenOf(Object object, String field)
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Whether this tween is considered to animate object for the given logical field or path. Used by FlixelTweenManager.cancelTweensOf(Object, String...) and related APIs.
      Overrides:
      isTweenOf in class FlixelTween
      Parameters:
      object - The instance to test (e.g. the root passed to cancelTweensOf).
      field - Optional goal key or dotted path (e.g. "x" or "weapon.rotation"); null or empty matches any field on object for types that support it.
      Returns:
      false by default; subclasses override.

    • reset

      Specified by:
      reset in interface com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
      Overrides:
